name: Flower Cardian Zebra Grass with Moon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>花札衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カーディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>芒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すすき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>月</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 Level 8 "Flower Cardian" monster, except "Flower Cardian Zebra Grass with Moon". If this card is Special Summoned: Draw 1 card, and if you do, show it, then you can Special Summon it if it is a "Flower Cardian" monster. Otherwise, send it to the GY. Once per turn, when this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can draw 1 card.
